_comment: Example cluster config. workspace-init writes the real one to .claude/harness/seams/clusters.json, deriving clusters FROM the repo catalog by detected platform grouping. Repo names below are neutral placeholders; replace with your workspace slugs.

hunters.mechanism: one repo imports a package published or vendored by another
hunters.guidance: read dependency manifests and import statements naming a sibling package

hunters.mechanism: a repo calls another's HTTP or REST endpoint
hunters.guidance: grep client base URLs and route strings, match to server routes

hunters.mechanism: a shared schema or spec generated in one repo and consumed in another
hunters.guidance: find spec files and their generated clients across repos

hunters.mechanism: shared datastore tables written by one repo and read by another
hunters.guidance: match table names across DDL and query sources

hunters.mechanism: a manifest or submodule pinning another repo at a revision
hunters.guidance: read manifest and submodule files, one pinned entry per edge
